cortex - Long-term memory for your AI agents.
npm package: @alaarab/cortex

Quick start:
  npx @alaarab/cortex init
  This creates ~/.cortex, registers MCP for detected agents, sets up lifecycle hooks, and registers your machine.
  Restart your agent after init. Context injection starts immediately.

MCP Tools (22):

  Search and browse:
    search_knowledge(query, type?, limit?, project?) - FTS5 search with synonym expansion
    get_project_summary(name) - project summary card and file list
    list_projects() - all projects in active profile
    list_machines() - registered machines and their profiles
    list_profiles() - all profiles and which projects each includes

  Backlog management:
    get_backlog(project?) - read tasks for one or all projects
    add_backlog_item(project, item) - add task to Queue section
    complete_backlog_item(project, item) - match by text, move to Done
    update_backlog_item(project, item, updates) - change priority, context, or section

  Learning capture:
    add_learning(project, learning, citation?: { file?, line?, repo?, commit? }) - append learning with optional citation
    remove_learning(project, learning) - remove by matching text
    push_changes(message?) - commit and push all cortex changes

  Memory governance:
    pin_memory(project, memory) - write canonical/pinned memory that bypasses decay
    govern_memories(project?) - queue stale/conflicting/low-value entries for review
    prune_memories(project?) - delete expired entries by retention policy
    consolidate_memories(project?) - deduplicate and rewrite LEARNINGS.md
    memory_feedback(key, feedback) - record helpful/reprompt/regression outcomes
    migrate_legacy_findings(project, pinCanonical?, dryRun?) - promote legacy findings into LEARNINGS/CANONICAL
    memory_policy(mode, ...) - get/set retention, TTL, decay, confidence thresholds
    memory_workflow(mode, ...) - get/set risky-memory approval workflow settings
    memory_access(mode, ...) - get/set role-based permissions
    index_policy(mode, ...) - configure include/exclude globs and hidden-doc indexing

CLI Commands:

  cortex                               - interactive shell (TTY default)
  cortex shell                         - explicit shell mode
  cortex search <query>                - FTS5 search with synonym expansion
  cortex add-learning <project> "..."  - append a learning from the terminal
  cortex pin-memory <project> "..."    - promote canonical memory
  cortex doctor [--fix]                - health checks with optional self-heal
  cortex memory-ui [--port=3499]       - lightweight memory review UI
  cortex update                        - update to latest version
  cortex govern-memories [project]     - queue stale/conflicting memories
  cortex prune-memories [project]      - delete expired entries
  cortex consolidate-memories [project]- deduplicate LEARNINGS.md
  cortex extract-memories [project]    - mine git and GitHub signals into candidates
  cortex migrate-findings <project>    - promote legacy findings docs
  cortex memory-policy get|set ...     - retention, decay, confidence tuning
  cortex memory-workflow get|set ...   - approval workflow tuning
  cortex memory-access get|set ...     - role permissions
  cortex index-policy get|set ...      - indexer include/exclude globs
  cortex mcp-mode on|off|status       - toggle MCP integration
  cortex hooks-mode on|off|status     - toggle hook execution
  cortex quality-feedback --key=<k> --type=helpful|reprompt|regression - record memory feedback

Environment Variables:

  CORTEX_PATH                    - override cortex directory (default: ~/.cortex)
  CORTEX_PROFILE                 - active profile name (filters indexed projects)
  CORTEX_ACTOR                   - identity for access control and audit logging
  CORTEX_DEBUG                   - set to 1 for debug logging to ~/.cortex/debug.log
  CORTEX_CONTEXT_TOKEN_BUDGET    - max approx tokens injected by hook-prompt (default: 550)
  CORTEX_CONTEXT_SNIPPET_LINES   - max lines per injected snippet (default: 6)
  CORTEX_CONTEXT_SNIPPET_CHARS   - max chars per injected snippet (default: 520)
  CORTEX_FEATURE_AUTO_EXTRACT    - toggle git/GitHub mining in hook-prompt (default: on, set 0 to disable)
  CORTEX_FEATURE_DAILY_MAINTENANCE - toggle detached daily governance (default: on, set 0 to disable)
  CORTEX_GH_TIMEOUT_MS           - GitHub mining timeout (default: 10000)
  CORTEX_GH_RETRIES              - GitHub mining retries (default: 2)
  CORTEX_GH_PR_LIMIT             - max PRs to scan (default: 40)
  CORTEX_GH_RUN_LIMIT            - max CI runs to scan (default: 25)
  CORTEX_GH_ISSUE_LIMIT          - max issues to scan (default: 25)

Key File Locations:

  ~/.cortex/                     - cortex root directory
  ~/.cortex/machines.yaml        - hostname-to-profile mapping
  ~/.cortex/profiles/            - profile YAML files listing projects per profile
  ~/.cortex/<project>/summary.md - five-line project summary card
  ~/.cortex/<project>/CLAUDE.md  - full project context (architecture, commands, conventions)
  ~/.cortex/<project>/KNOWLEDGE.md - deep reference (API details, data models)
  ~/.cortex/<project>/LEARNINGS.md - bugs, patterns, things to avoid
  ~/.cortex/<project>/CANONICAL_MEMORIES.md - pinned high-signal memories
  ~/.cortex/<project>/backlog.md - task queue across sessions
  ~/.cortex/<project>/MEMORY_QUEUE.md - items pending human review
  ~/.cortex/.governance/         - governance policy JSON files
  ~/.cortex/global/skills/       - personal workflow slash commands
  ~/.cortex/global/CLAUDE.md     - user-level agent instructions

Agent Support:

  Claude Code    - full hooks + MCP, writes ~/.claude/settings.json
  Copilot CLI    - hooks in ~/.github/hooks/cortex.json, symlinks copilot-instructions.md
  Cursor         - hooks in ~/.cursor/hooks.json (no session-start hook)
  OpenAI Codex   - hooks in codex.json, symlinks AGENTS.md
  Agentskills    - cortex.SKILL.md in cortex root

Docs: https://alaarab.github.io/cortex/
Source: https://github.com/alaarab/cortex
